subject: [RFC PATCH 8/9 v2] mm/memcontrol: Make memory.high tier-aware

2026-04-23.patch_summary: This patch makes the memory.high protection tier-aware, allowing it to enforce a fair distribution of toptier memory among workloads in isolated memory cgroups. It extends the existing memory.high protection by selectively reclaiming on toptier nodes when memory.high is breached or toptier.high is breached, and throttling allocations when toptier is breached. This ensures consistent baseline performance across workloads by considering workload-external factors such as co-location and start order.
